# Permanently excluded works
# ───────────────────────────
# Add one entry per line to prevent a paper from ever being proposed again.
#
# Two formats are supported — the script detects which to use automatically:
#
#   DOI (for papers that have one):
#     10.48550/arxiv.2603.11477
#
#   Title substring (for papers without a DOI, or when you don't have the DOI
#   handy — any distinctive phrase from the title works):
#     agrifood campaign planning
#     urban analytics series
#
# The PR opened by the workflow shows a ready-to-paste "To exclude:" hint
# for each proposed paper.
#
10.48550/arxiv.2305.16205
10.48550/arxiv.2103.15909
